narrative:
Pleasant Twp. township has 3,625 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
